scripts.prepare: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc
scripts.prepare:test-deps: yarn --cwd ../.. workspace @mandel59/mojidata run prepare && yarn --cwd ../.. workspace @mandel59/idsdb run prepare && yarn --cwd ../.. workspace @mandel59/mojidata-api-core run prepare && yarn --cwd ../.. workspace @mandel59/mojidata-api-hono run prepare && yarn --cwd ../.. workspace @mandel59/mojidata-api-runtime run prepare
scripts.test: yarn run prepare:test-deps && yarn prepare && node --import tsx --test ./tests/*.test.ts
scripts.test:ci: yarn run prepare:test-deps && yarn prepare && node --import tsx --test ./tests/*.test.ts
